name: Outlaw Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon Lawry's Seasoned Salt, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the fajita seasoning and squeeze the lime juice over the meat.
2. Place the meat in a pan with the lime peels.
3. Cover with beer and add Pickapeppa Sauce and Woody's Barbeque Sauce along with seasoned salt and pepper.
4. Let marinate for 24 hours.
5. Grill the steaks over a mesquite fire, turning frequently to baste with marinade.
6. Add onion wedges and cover; cook for 10 to 15 minutes.
7. When done, cut fajitas into 4-inch-long strips.
8. Reheat with the remaining marinade.
Carolyn's Note: The recipe didn't specify preparation details. I would place some in a large warmed flour tortilla with sour cream, guacamole, and onion pieces, then roll up to eat. (I haven't tried this recipe yet. It sounds very good.)
